## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm lint` and `pnpm typecheck` pass
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes (if touching build-affecting code)
- [ ] Docs updated (if user-facing behavior changed)
- [ ] No secrets or `.env` values committed
